name: ai-slop
description: An Agent Skill that catches AI slop in any prose, adding conventions for empirical software engineering papers and mechanics for LaTeX source (BibTeX, reference checks, citation macros, grounding comments) — loaded automatically for .tex source, with --scientific opting a non-LaTeX manuscript into the paper conventions. Fetches the live AI-trope catalog from tropes.fyi at invocation.

plugins.name: ai-slop
plugins.description: Catch AI slop and apply writing conventions to any prose — drafting Markdown, documentation, or a blog post. Editing .tex files adds the empirical software engineering paper rules plus LaTeX checks (BibTeX, reference verification) automatically; --scientific applies the paper rules to a non-LaTeX manuscript. Combines these with the community-maintained tropes.fyi catalog of general AI writing patterns.
